title: 1.1: Identifies that the SFTP server signals readiness via a log message indicating listener registration.
1.2: States that when a non-existent user attempts to connect, the connection_failed log shows an error (e.g 'Credentials cannot be null or empty').
1.3: States that the root endpoint (/) returns HTTP 301 redirecting to /web/users.
1.4: States that when the database is missing, the server terminates immediately.
1.6: States that when no host keys are configured, the server auto-generates a new RSA private key.
1.7: Reports that the default SFTP bind port is 2022 as revealed in the config warning log.
1.8: Identifies the HTTP server initialization log message has no explicit 'listening' announcement.
1.9: States that the default HTTP bind port is 8080 as revealed in the config warning log.
1.10: States that the default idle timeout is 15 minutes as revealed in the config warning log.
